proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_009 == 1` have more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores than cell lines with `feature_009 == 0`.
Cell lines with `feature_022 == 1` have more negative `dependency_EGFR` scores than cell lines with `feature_022 == 0`.
Cell lines with `feature_024 == 1` have more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores than cell lines with `feature_024 == 0`.
Cell lines with `feature_014 == 1` have more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than cell lines with `feature_014 == 0`.

analyses.result_summary: `dependency_BRAF` mean was -0.804698 for `feature_009 == 1` versus -0.249503 for `feature_009 == 0`.
`dependency_EGFR` mean was -0.601046 for `feature_022 == 1` versus -0.252407 for `feature_022 == 0`.
`dependency_ERBB2` mean was -0.685595 for `feature_024 == 1` versus -0.253473 for `feature_024 == 0`.
`dependency_KRAS` mean was -0.559415 for `feature_014 == 1` versus -0.251959 for `feature_014 == 0`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_011 == "skin"` have more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores than other cell lines.
Cell lines with `feature_011 == "pancreatic"` have more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than other cell lines.
Cell lines with `feature_011 == "brain"` have more negative `dependency_EGFR` scores than other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: `dependency_BRAF` mean was -0.472054 in `feature_011 == "skin"` lines versus -0.293803 in all other lines.
`dependency_KRAS` mean was -0.426019 in `feature_011 == "pancreatic"` lines versus -0.313272 in other lines.
`dependency_EGFR` mean was -0.330699 in `feature_011 == "brain"` lines versus -0.275528 in other lines.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_027 == 1` have more negative `dependency_RIT1` scores than cell lines with `feature_027 == 0`.
Cell lines in the top quartile of `feature_016` (`feature_016 >= 0.964`) have more negative `dependency_TMED10` scores than the remaining cell lines.
Cell lines in the top quartile of `feature_023` (`feature_023 >= 5.669`) have more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores than the remaining cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: `dependency_RIT1` mean was -0.352716 for `feature_027 == 1` versus -0.257196 for `feature_027 == 0`.
`dependency_TMED10` mean was -0.281605 in the top quartile of `feature_016` versus -0.244729 in the remaining lines.
`dependency_DHX9` mean was -0.355124 in the top quartile of `feature_023` versus -0.326514 in the remaining lines.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines in the top quartile of `feature_016` (`feature_016 >= 0.964`) have more negative `dependency_POLR2A` scores than the remaining cell lines.
Cell lines with `feature_018 == 1` have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than cell lines with `feature_018 == 0`.
Cell lines in the top quartile of `feature_003` (`feature_003 >= 0.428`) have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than the remaining cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: `dependency_POLR2A` mean was -0.497174 in the top quartile of `feature_016` versus -0.392828 in the remaining lines.
`dependency_RPL11` mean was -0.361392 for `feature_018 == 1` versus -0.252335 for `feature_018 == 0`.
`dependency_RPL11` mean was -0.343967 in the top quartile of `feature_003` versus -0.245214 in the remaining lines.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_011 == "colorectal"` have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than other cell lines.
Cell lines with `feature_035 == 1` have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than cell lines with `feature_035 == 0`.
Cell lines in the top quartile of `feature_028` (`feature_028 >= 0.819`) have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than the remaining cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: `dependency_KIF18A` mean was -0.720354 in `feature_011 == "colorectal"` lines versus -0.252397 in other lines.
`dependency_KIF18A` mean was -0.544702 for `feature_035 == 1` versus -0.252583 for `feature_035 == 0`.
`dependency_KIF18A` mean was -0.469402 in the top quartile of `feature_028` versus -0.252593 in the remaining lines.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with both `feature_011 == "colorectal"` and `feature_035 == 1` have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than all other cell lines.
Cell lines with both `feature_011 == "colorectal"` and top-quartile `feature_028` (`feature_028 >= 0.819`) have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than all other cell lines.
Cell lines with both `feature_035 == 1` and top-quartile `feature_028` (`feature_028 >= 0.819`) have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than all other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: `dependency_KIF18A` mean was -0.942531 in `feature_011 == "colorectal"` and `feature_035 == 1` lines versus -0.252676 in the remaining lines.
`dependency_KIF18A` mean was -0.928802 in `feature_011 == "colorectal"` and `feature_028 >= 0.819` lines versus -0.252657 in the remaining lines.
`dependency_KIF18A` mean was -0.731118 in `feature_035 == 1` and `feature_028 >= 0.819` lines versus -0.253025 in the remaining lines.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The strongest `dependency_KIF18A` subgroup is `feature_011 == "colorectal"`, `feature_035 == 1`, `feature_028 >= 0.819`, and `feature_020 == 0`, with more negative scores than all other cell lines; within the same colorectal/`feature_035`/`feature_028` context, `feature_020 == 1` suppresses the dependency.

Within `feature_011 == "colorectal"`, `feature_035 == 1`, `feature_028 >= 0.819`, and `feature_020 == 0` cell lines, top-quartile `feature_017` (`feature_017 >= 3.559`) further strengthens `dependency_KIF18A`.

analyses.result_summary: The complete KIF18A subgroup (`feature_011 == "colorectal"`, `feature_035 == 1`, `feature_028 >= 0.819`, `feature_020 == 0`) had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -1.299007 versus -0.253046 in all other lines.

Inside the colorectal/`feature_035 == 1`/`feature_028 >= 0.819` context, `feature_020 == 0` had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -1.299007 whereas `feature_020 == 1` had mean -0.255748, consistent with suppression by `feature_020 == 1`.
Adding `feature_017 >= 3.559` to the complete KIF18A subgroup gave mean `dependency_KIF18A` -1.332042 versus -0.274882 outside that subgroup.

proposed_hypotheses.text: A systematic pairwise heterogeneity search should identify the strongest two-feature subgroup for each dependency outcome, with more negative dependency scores in the enriched subgroup.

analyses.result_summary: For `dependency_BRAF`, the strongest pairwise negative subgroup was `feature_009 == 1` and `feature_030 == 0`: mean -0.805488 versus -0.254046 outside the subgroup.
For `dependency_EGFR`, the strongest pairwise negative subgroup was `feature_016 >= 0.964` and `feature_022 == 1`: mean -0.625265 versus -0.272664 outside the subgroup.
For `dependency_ERBB2`, the strongest pairwise negative subgroup was `feature_022 == 0` and `feature_024 == 1`: mean -0.685455 versus -0.256880 outside the subgroup.
For `dependency_KRAS`, the strongest pairwise negative subgroup was `feature_014 == 1` and `feature_021 == 0`: mean -0.558583 versus -0.257146 outside the subgroup.
For `dependency_RIT1`, the strongest pairwise negative subgroup was `feature_011 == "brain"` and `feature_027 == 1`: mean -0.404687 versus -0.264988 outside the subgroup.

For `dependency_KIF18A`, pairwise search pointed to `feature_011 == "colorectal"` and `feature_035 == 1`: mean -0.942531 versus -0.252676 outside the subgroup, motivating the complete subgroup refinement.
For `dependency_TMED10`, the strongest pairwise negative subgroup was `feature_011 == "prostate"` and `feature_016 >= 0.964`: mean -0.306651 versus -0.253343 outside the subgroup.
For `dependency_DHX9`, the strongest pairwise negative subgroup was `feature_010 == "squamous"` and `feature_023 >= 5.669`: mean -0.398489 versus -0.332900 outside the subgroup.
For `dependency_POLR2A`, the strongest pairwise negative subgroup was `feature_016 >= 0.964` and `feature_027 == 0`: mean -0.500302 versus -0.395028 outside the subgroup.
For `dependency_RPL11`, the strongest pairwise negative subgroup was `feature_016 >= 0.964` and `feature_018 == 1`: mean -0.393572 versus -0.263239 outside the subgroup.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_010 == "her2_enriched"` have less negative `dependency_EGFR` scores than other cell lines.
Higher continuous `feature_019` values are associated with less negative `dependency_RIT1` scores.
Cell lines with `feature_032 == 1` have less negative `dependency_TMED10` scores than cell lines with `feature_032 == 0`.
Cell lines with `feature_010 == "basal"` have less negative `dependency_POLR2A` scores than other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: `dependency_EGFR` mean was -0.261708 in `feature_010 == "her2_enriched"` lines versus -0.279835 in other lines, but the difference was not statistically significant.
The linear slope of `dependency_RIT1` on `feature_019` was positive but not statistically significant.
`dependency_TMED10` mean was -0.245766 for `feature_032 == 1` versus -0.254790 for `feature_032 == 0`, but the difference was not statistically significant.
`dependency_POLR2A` mean was -0.407316 in `feature_010 == "basal"` lines versus -0.419585 in other lines, but the difference was not statistically significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The final best-supported `dependency_BRAF` subgroup is `feature_009 == 1`, with skin lineage (`feature_011 == "skin"`) as an additional weaker negative modifier.
The final best-supported `dependency_EGFR` subgroup is `feature_022 == 1`, with high `feature_016` and brain lineage (`feature_011 == "brain"`) adding weaker negative heterogeneity.
The final best-supported `dependency_ERBB2` subgroup is `feature_024 == 1`; `feature_022 == 0` does not suppress that dependency and appears in the strongest pairwise subgroup.
The final best-supported `dependency_KRAS` subgroup is `feature_014 == 1`, with pancreatic lineage (`feature_011 == "pancreatic"`) as an additional weaker negative modifier.
The final best-supported `dependency_RIT1` subgroup is `feature_027 == 1`, with the strongest screened pair occurring in brain lineage (`feature_011 == "brain"`) and `feature_027 == 1`.

The final best-supported `dependency_KIF18A` subgroup is `feature_011 == "colorectal"`, `feature_035 == 1`, `feature_028 >= 0.819`, and `feature_020 == 0`; `feature_020 == 1` suppresses this dependency.
The final best-supported `dependency_TMED10` pattern is a modest high-`feature_016` negative association, strongest in `feature_011 == "prostate"` and `feature_016 >= 0.964` cell lines.
The final best-supported `dependency_DHX9` pattern is a modest high-`feature_023` negative association, strongest in `feature_010 == "squamous"` and `feature_023 >= 5.669` cell lines.
The final best-supported `dependency_POLR2A` pattern is a strong high-`feature_016` negative association, with the strongest pairwise subgroup `feature_016 >= 0.964` and `feature_027 == 0`.
The final best-supported `dependency_RPL11` subgroup is `feature_018 == 1` with additional high-`feature_016` or high-`feature_003` negative modifiers.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_009 == 1` remained the dominant BRAF dependency signal; the skin-lineage effect was smaller but significant.
`feature_022 == 1` remained the dominant EGFR dependency signal; the strongest pair with high `feature_016` had effect -0.352601.
`feature_024 == 1` remained the dominant ERBB2 dependency signal; the strongest pairwise subgroup had a similar effect of -0.428575.
`feature_014 == 1` remained the dominant KRAS dependency signal; pancreatic lineage was a weaker additional negative modifier.
`feature_027 == 1` was the dominant RIT1 dependency signal, and the brain/`feature_027 == 1` pair showed stronger enrichment.
The complete KIF18A subgroup was the largest discovered effect in the screen, with effect -1.045960 versus all other lines and suppression by `feature_020 == 1` inside the same context.
TMED10 effects were modest: high `feature_016` had effect -0.036876, while the strongest pairwise subgroup had effect -0.053308.
DHX9 effects were modest: high `feature_023` had effect -0.028610, while the strongest pairwise subgroup had effect -0.065589.
POLR2A showed a strong high-`feature_016` association, with effect -0.104346 for the top quartile and -0.105274 in the strongest pairwise subgroup.
RPL11 showed a strong `feature_018 == 1` association, and high `feature_016` plus `feature_018 == 1` gave the strongest pairwise subgroup effect of -0.130333.
